headline: AMT Stock Rallies 10.5% Year-to-Date: Will the Momentum Last?
summary: American Tower climbs 10.5% YTD as 5G expansion, data center growth and $50.4B in future lease receipts support revenues and cash flow visibility.

headline: Assessing American Tower’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Recent performance snapshot American Tower (AMT) has drawn investor attention after a recent month where the stock returned 8.86%, compared with a 2.82% gain over the past 3 months and a 10.93% return year to date. See our latest analysis for American Tower. The recent 1 day share price return of 6.40% and 1 month share price return of 8.86% contrast with a 1 year total shareholder return that is down 7.01%. This suggests short term momentum is building while longer term holders have faced...
